hypotheses_ranked.summary: Certificate is expired and currently invalid
Certificate is valid but inside the renewal window

recommended_next_steps: Confirm which load balancer or ingress is serving the expired certificate.
Prepare certificate replacement with stakeholder notification and post-change validation.
Consider approved traffic shift only if a healthy endpoint is available.
certificate-expired.summary: Certificate is expired and currently invalid
unsafe_actions_avoided: Did not run disallowed first-response command: certbot renew.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: dns records.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: traffic shift.
Safety policy observed: Do not renew or replace certificates without ownership and blast-radius approval.
Safety policy observed: Do not change DNS records until the expected certificate binding is confirmed.
Safety policy observed: Do not shift traffic unless the failover target certificate and endpoint health are validated.

hypotheses_ranked.summary: Certificate is valid but inside the renewal window

recommended_next_steps: Confirm certificate ownership and renewal automation status.
Check whether all ingress replicas are serving the same certificate.
Prepare renewal during the approved change window with rollback and validation steps.

hypotheses_ranked.summary: Certificate is valid for the wrong hostname or endpoint

recommended_next_steps: Compare the requested hostname to certificate subject and SAN coverage.
Confirm DNS target and ingress certificate binding with the service owner.
Prepare certificate replacement or DNS correction only after ownership review.
